title: Blunder Pearl
description:
"You did a bad move."

A resourcepack that turns your ender pearls into blunder icons from chess.com.
body:
![Blunder Pearl Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf4ccb3fe4aa6cbb425ec5f7931f135d37291c67.png)

_A resourcepack that turns your ender pearls into blunder icons from chess.com._

---

### What?

A resourcepack that replaces:
- Ender Pearl -> Blunder Pearl ![Blunder Pearl Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b00d092d6036190c231cf7c1e58d0fa5e171109d.png)
- Eye of Ender -> Brilliant Eye ![Brilliant Eye Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2c4a797794a56c7a9c3c7e1e790b2df43b6de66.png)

### Why?

Because I thought it would be funny. Also I'm not particularly good at using pearls.

### Where?
For screenshots, see [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blunder-pearl/gallery). For releases, see [versions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blunder-pearl/versions).
